title: tetraneuris argentea
intro: Tetraneuris argentea, also known as Gray's rosinweed or silverleaf rosinweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tetraneuris argentea include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Tetraneuris argentea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal medicine.
